NEXT_PUBLIC_CLERK_PUBLISHABLE_KEY.description: Clerk publishable key (pk_test_* in dev/preview, pk_live_* in prod)

CLERK_SECRET_KEY.description: Clerk secret key (sk_test_* in dev/preview, sk_live_* in prod)

PLANETSCALE_DATABASE_URL.description: PostgreSQL (PlanetScale) RUNTIME connection string — the sole datastore. Dev/preview point at liveone-dev; prod connects via the discrete DB_* vars instead. The app needs this OR the full DB_* set — without either, every DB call throws '[PlanetScale] Database is not configured'.

PLANETSCALE_PROD_BRANCH_ID.description: Prod branch id that arms assertDbEnvironmentMatches. In dev/preview it makes the guard REFUSE any connection carrying the prod token (fail-closed); in prod it detects drift (fail-open alert). Recommended in every scope.

PLANETSCALE_DATABASE_URL_MIGRATIONS.description: DDL connection string used ONLY by npm run db:pg:migrate — never at runtime.

DB_HOST.description: PG host — the discrete-var fallback used when PLANETSCALE_DATABASE_URL is unset (prod's runtime path).

DB_USERNAME.description: PG username, e.g. postgres.<branch-id> (DB_* fallback path).

DB_SSL.description: Set to 'disable' for a local plaintext Postgres; otherwise TLS (encrypted, non-strict CA).

ALLOW_PROD_DB_IN_DEV.description: Escape hatch: set 'true' to let dev connect to the prod DB (bypasses the fail-closed guard). Use deliberately.

KV_REST_API_URL.description: Vercel KV REST URL — cache for latest point values. Degrades gracefully if unset (warnings, no errors).

REDIS_URL.description: Redis URL (alias some KV clients read).

CRON_SECRET.description: Bearer secret for /api/cron/* in prod. Dev bypasses via the x-claude header, so not needed locally.

CRONS_ENABLED.description: Scheduled crons run ONLY when 'true' (every env, incl. prod). Leave unset in dev/preview = off. Admin/x-claude/?force=true always bypass.

OBSERVATIONS_QSTASH_TOKEN.description: Upstash QStash token for the observations publish queue.

OBSERVATIONS_QSTASH_RECEIVER_URL.description: Public URL QStash delivers observations to (the receiver endpoint).

OBSERVATIONS_ALERT_WEBHOOK_URL.description: Slack-style webhook for DB-drift + observations-pipeline alerts.

TESLA_CLIENT_ID.description: Tesla Fleet API app client id (only if using the Tesla integration).

TESLA_CLIENT_SECRET.description: Tesla Fleet API app client secret.

TESLA_PUBLIC_KEY_PEM.description: Tesla EC P-256 public key PEM (served at /.well-known/appspecific/com.tesla.3p.public-key.pem).

TESLA_PRIVATE_KEY_PEM.description: Tesla EC P-256 private key PEM (Phase 2 command signing).

ENPHASE_API_KEY.description: Enphase API key (only if using the Enphase integration).

AMBER_API_KEY.description: Amber Electric API key (only if using the Amber integration).

NEXT_PUBLIC_APP_URL.description: Public base URL of the app, used to build absolute links.

ADMIN_USER_IDS.description: Comma-separated Clerk user IDs granted admin role.
